sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; import { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContext'; const DoctorDashboard = () => { const { user, logout } = useAuth(); const patients = [ { id: 1, name: "Margaret Doe", age: 72, risk: "Medium", lastVitals: "HR: 72, BP: 120/80", status: "Stable" }, { id: 2, name: "Robert Johnson", age: 78, risk: "High", lastVitals: "HR: 95, BP: 150/95", status: "Alert" }, { id: 3, name: "Emily Davis", age: 68, risk: "Low", lastVitals: "HR: 68, BP: 115/75", status: "Stable" }, ]; return (
ElderSafe Doctor Portal

{user?.name || 'Dr. Williams'}

Cardiologist • 3 Patients Active

Patient Overview

{patients.map(patient => ( ))}
Patient Name Age Last Vitals Risk Level Status Action
{patient.name} {patient.age} {patient.lastVitals} {patient.risk} {patient.status === 'Alert' ? Attention Needed : 'Normal'}
); }; export default DoctorDashboard;
